# Plan meal and recipe matching from inventory

## Summary

Define how ocent can infer which meals or recipes are possible based on current catalog and inventory data.

## Why

Inventory tracking becomes more useful when it supports practical household decisions such as cooking with currently available items.

## Scope

- define how products map to ingredients or ingredient groups
- define how hierarchy-based quantity aggregation influences recipe matching
- define partial and complete recipe availability states
- identify dependencies on catalog quality, aliases, and quantity tracking

## Acceptance Criteria

- the recipe matching concept is documented
- required product and ingredient mappings are identified
- complete and partial availability rules are defined
- follow-up implementation work can be derived from the result
